meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Project Blocks
content.seo_description: Learn to master Claude Code skills setup to overcome project stagnation. An advanced tutorial for freelancers to ship faster using Antigravity and Claude.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform abstract pain points into executable project blueprints. Use agentic workflows to automate the scaffolding of high-demand SaaS micro-tools, turning a blank screen into a deployed MVP in minutes. This setup forces productivity through systematic, AI-assisted feature engineering.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer's greatest enemy—a silent abyss where your billable hours go to die. You have the technical stack, but the friction of ideation keeps your portfolio stagnant while competitors ship daily. The market doesn't pay for potential; it pays for execution.

We are shifting the paradigm. By leveraging Claude Code’s deep context awareness alongside Antigravity’s architectural synthesis, you move from 'what should I build?' to 'what am I shipping next?' This isn't just a setup guide; it's a blueprint for building an automated engine that generates, scaffolds, and deploys high-value micro-SaaS tools on demand.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Niche
steps.description: Identify a specific micro-problem within a target industry to ensure your output is sellable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current trends in productivity SaaS and identify 3 high-demand, low-complexity micro-tool ideas for professional freelancers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a project roadmap for [Selected Idea] including core features and tech stack.'

steps.title: Architect the Scaffold
steps.description: Generate a robust project structure that follows enterprise standards to ensure maintainability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a production-ready folder structure and dependency list for a [Chosen Idea] using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Initialize the project directory and install necessary dependencies based on the generated structure.'

steps.title: Agentic Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on individual components, ensuring modularity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the core authentication and dashboard modules into atomic, testable functions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Build the Auth module using Supabase; ensure error handling and loading states are implemented.'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Implement automated checks to prevent regressions before they reach your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the core business logic components to ensure 90% coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Run tests and fix any failing components detected in the current build.'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure automated deployment scripts to ensure your work is ready for production immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment configuration script for Vercel that includes environment variable validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Configure the production environment and run the final build check for deployment.'

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing node_modules, saving context tokens and speeding up operations.
Force Claude to use 'System 2' thinking by asking it to 'critique its own proposed architecture' before writing any code.
Maintain a 'master-context.md' file in your project root; Claude can read this to understand project history without searching every file.
Use Antigravity to generate specialized 'custom instructions' for Claude, ensuring it adheres to your specific coding style and linting rules.
Never accept the first output; append 'refine this for performance optimization and accessibility' to every major code block generation.
content.next_steps: Once the build is complete, deploy to a staging environment, conduct a final security audit with Claude, and prepare your marketing landing page using the same AI workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting project paralysis dictate your revenue. By mastering these tools, you turn every idea into a prototype in record time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
